# B2BinDemand

B2BinDemand is a global B2B demand generation company with 170+ specialists helping B2B technology, SaaS, and professional services companies identify in-market buyers and build consistent pipeline through intent-powered, multi-channel campaigns.

## Services

- Campaigns+ (full-funnel demand generation)
- Intent Targeting (buyer intent data and real-time signal identification)
- Smart Syndication (targeted content syndication to verified in-market buyers)
- Event-Based Lead Generation (pre-, during-, and post-event pipeline generation)

## Resources

- Blog: Insights on B2B lead generation, intent targeting, content syndication, and event marketing for revenue and demand generation teams.
- Library: Free guides, case studies, and benchmark reports on demand generation, content syndication, and intent-based B2B marketing.
- The Demand Signal: Cold prospect nurture email programme.

## Pages

- Homepage: https://b2bindemand.com/ — Intent-powered B2B lead generation. Identifies in-market B2B buyers and delivers them to pipeline through smart content syndication, intent targeting, and event-based campaigns.
- Campaigns+: https://b2bindemand.com/campaigns — Full-funnel B2B demand generation campaigns targeting the right accounts, engaging buying committees, and delivering pipeline-ready leads across every channel.
- Intent Targeting: https://b2bindemand.com/intent-targeting — B2B buyer intent data and real-time signal identification to surface in-market accounts before competitors do.
- Smart Syndication: https://b2bindemand.com/smart-syndication — B2B content syndication services that distribute content to verified in-market buyers and deliver qualified leads, not just downloads.
- Event-Based Lead Generation: https://b2bindemand.com/event-based-lead-generation — B2B event lead generation covering attendee acquisition, intent-based targeting of registered attendees, and post-event lead nurturing sequences.
- Blog: https://b2bindemand.com/blog — Insights on B2B lead generation, intent targeting, content syndication, and event marketing for revenue and demand generation teams.
- Library: https://b2bindemand.com/library — Free guides, case studies, and benchmark reports on demand generation, content syndication, and intent-based B2B marketing.
- About B2BinDemand: https://b2bindemand.com/about-b2bindemand — Company overview. 170+ specialists, global operations, focus on B2B technology and SaaS pipeline generation.
- Careers: https://b2bindemand.com/b2bindemand-careers — Open roles in B2B marketing, data research, and demand generation across the US, Canada, and India.
- FAQs: https://b2bindemand.com/faqs — Answers to common questions about content syndication, intent targeting, and demand generation campaigns.
